maay_maay.visual_theme_quick_switcher: Baddal degdeg ah oo visual theme
maay_maay.or_skip_no_pressure: Ama ka bood — cadaadis ma leh.
maay_maay.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: waa meesha dadka badankood ka bilaabaan — faraha waxay saaran yihiin a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
maay_maay.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: badhanka. Dyslexia font, audio cues, high-contrast, large-key keyboard, iyo wax kale — iyagu waa alaabta laftooda, maaha xal beddel ah.
maay_maay.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Timer ma leh, tartan ma leh, ciqaab streak ma leh. U soco xawaaraha aad. Nasasho waqti kasta.
maay_maay.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: drill — AI wuxuu qoraa qoraal tababar oo heerkaaga fasalka ah oo ku saabsan wax kasta oo aad daneyneyso. Shid
maay_maay.and_it_will_illustrate_what_you_type: wuxuuna sawiri doonaa waxa aad qorto.
maay_maay.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: way beddeli kartaa — safka midabbada ee kore wuxuu u beddelaa 5 visual theme. Ama riix
maay_maay.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Takhaatiir ama macallin wuxuu dhigi karaa IEP goal wuxuuna dhoofin karaa horumar laga bilaabo
maay_maay.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Maalmo kalandar oo gaar ah oo leh ugu yaraan hal session 30-kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay. Dambi kuma jiro maalmaha nasashada.
maay_maay.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Qor ama dhaji qoraalka. Xarfo caadi ah, tirooyin, iyo calaamado caadi ah ayaa si fiican u shaqeeya.
maay_maay.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — session-kan lama kaydin doono. Cadaadis ma leh, diiwaan ma leh.
maay_maay.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Ama riix Space ama Enter si aad u bilowdo. Riix Esc waqti kasta inta drill socoto si aad uga baxdo.
maay_maay.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Qoraallada aan Ingiriisi ahayn waxay isticmaalaan ASCII kaliya (accents / tildes ma leh) si furayaasha keyboard-ka caadiga ah ay u sii ahaadaan bartilmaameedka tababarka.
maay_maay.a_gentle_reach_up: tallaabo yar oo kor u ah
maay_maay.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: tusaale, hawada, eeyaha, Minecraft, badda, jiilaalka Maine
maay_maay.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Passage sets gacan lagu qoray oo shaqeeya iyada oo aan AI la isticmaalin. Passages la soo dejiyay waxay ku biiraan library-gaaga la kaydiyay; passage isku mid ah toddobaad ka toddobaad waa saldhig ka caddaalad badan IEP trend marka loo eego qoraal dib loo abuuray.
maay_maay.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Passages dhawaan la sameeyay. Drill mid kasta si aad dib ugu isticmaasho. Kii ugu da'da weyn wuu dhacaa marka aad samayso kan 9-aad.
maay_maay.warmup_mode_session_will_not_be_saved: Warmup mode — session lama kaydin doono
maay_maay.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Bar kasta = xarfaha la qoray daaqad 10-second ah. Hover si aad u aragto WPM qiyaas ah.
maay_maay.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Jawaabtaadu waxay ka caawisaa macallimiinta inay arkaan marka tirooyinku aysan sheegin sheekada oo dhan.
maay_maay.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Sidee u socotay session-kan? "Waxaan bilaabay si tartiib ah, waan sii adkeystay, waxaan isticmaalay slow-motion mode..."
maay_maay.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Note-ka waa lala kaydiyay session-kan. Wuxuu ka soo muuqan doonaa IEP report iyo CSV export.
maay_maay.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Wanaaji sawirka ugu dambeeyay adigoo isticmaalaya image-to-image halkii aad ka bilaabi lahayd bilow
maay_maay.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Soo dejiso sawirkan sida faylka PNG
maay_maay.recent_tap_to_restore: Dhawaan · taabo si aad u soo celiso
maay_maay.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Ku celi isku qoraalka si aad uga gudubto dhibcahaaga
maay_maay.undo_this_session_entirely: Dib u noqo session-kan gebi ahaanteed
maay_maay.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Wuxuu tusayaa passage buuxa inta ilbiriqsi ah kahor inta aan qorista bilaaban. Wuxuu ka caawiyaa ardayda ka faa'iideysta akhriska marka hore, ka dibna soo saarista. Ardaygu wuu ka boodi karaa count-in waqti kasta.
maay_maay.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Ka dib intatan daqiiqadood oo qorid firfircoon (waqtiga la joojiyay lama tirinayo), tus xasuusin jilicsan oo ah in la nasto. Wuxuu dhacaa hal mar drill kasta. Waa laga bilaabo damaan.
maay_maay.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Beddel muuqaalka oo dhan ee qalabka. High-contrast mode wuu ka sarreeyaa themes. Kawaii waa theme iftiin ah; kuwa kalena waa nooc madow.
maay_maay.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Beddel midabka iftiiminta ee loo isticmaalo xarafka hadda, badhamada, iyo dhagaxyada calaamadaha. Ardayda buluugga u arka mid aad u qabow ama doonaya midabbo diiran si ay u fiirsadaan. High-contrast mode wuu ka sarreeyaa tan.
maay_maay.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Door qoraallo drill oo gaagaaban ama dhaadheer. "Gaaban" wuxuu ka caawiyaa ardayda leh dhibaato feejignaan ama daal; "Dheer" waa ardayda dhisaya adkaysi. Haddii drill uusan lahayn samples u dhigma doorbidka, wuxuu isticmaalaa mid kasta.
maay_maay.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Dhibic jilicsan oo garaacaysa oo ku taal shaashadda drill waxay calaamadeysaa rhythm joogto ah. MA JIRO ciqaab haddii aad si tartiib ah u tagto — waa reference, maaha waqti xad. Waxtar u leh motor-planning. Waa laga bilaabo damaan.
maay_maay.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Kani waa boosaaga. Maxaad u tababaranaysaa? Bartilmaameedkaaga maanta waa maxay? Ka gooni ah IEP goal-ka takhaatiirta.
maay_maay.why_i_m_practicing_shown_on_menu: Sababta aan u tababaranayo (lagu tusayo menu)
maay_maay.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: tusaale, "Qorista hadda way adag tahay, laakiin waxaan awoodi doonaa inaan qoro sheekooyinkeyga." · "Waxaan rabaa inaan email u diro ayeeyo iyada oo aan hooyaday i caawin." · "Qorid degdeg ah = waqti hoos u dhac ah oo homework ah."
maay_maay.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Hadafka maanta waa kaaga — laguuma tirinayo haddii aad seegto. Si toos ah ayuu dib u dhigayaa berri.
maay_maay.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Dhig IEP-style goal halkan. Wuxuu ka muuqdaa shaashadda drill wuxuuna hore u buuxiyaa progress report. Waxaa loo baahan yahay oo keliya haddii aad samaynayso progress notes rasmi ah.
maay_maay.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Isticmaal initials ama magac been ah — AlloFlow waxaa loo naqshadeeyay inuu FERPA-safe ahaado.
maay_maay.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: tusaale, Wuxuu doorbidaa home-row oo leh large-key keyboard; yaree qaladaadka kahor intaadan kordhin xawaaraha.
maay_maay.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Kaydi accommodations + IEP goal + audio theme JSON, ama ka soo raro profile qalab kale. LAMA koobiyeynayo session history — taasi waxay ku hartaa arday kasta.
maay_maay.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Full backup wuxuu ka kooban yahay sessions, personal best, mastery, error heatmap, iyo labada library — diiwaanka ardayga oo dhan. Isticmaal kahor intaadan tirtirin browser data ama beddelin qalab.
maay_maay.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Waddadaada koritaanka gaarka ah. Isbarbardhig facood ma leh — kaliya adiga, muddada.
maay_maay.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Waxay saameysaa trend, report, CSV. Skill tree wuxuu ahaadaa all-time.
maay_maay.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Ku dar ama wax ka beddel note. Wuxuu kaydiyaa marka la ka baxo ama Ctrl+Enter.
maay_maay.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Cagaar Δ = horumar · casaan = dib u dhac · grey = xukun lama saarin (muddo, tirada accommodations).
maay_maay.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Keys-ka qaladka ugu badan drill kasta · all-time
maay_maay.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drills kala duwan waxay soo bandhigaan daciifnimo kala duwan. Isticmaal tan si aad u dooranto drills bartilmaameedsanaya keys gaar ah oo dhib leh.
maay_maay.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Kuwani waxay u dabaaldegaan isku dayga accommodations — maaha qarinta. Isticmaalka waxa caawiya waa xoog, maaha daciifnimo.
maay_maay.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: WPM celcelis ah oo leh accommodation kasta oo shidan vs demman. Waa isuduwid dhex mara noocyada drill — isku darka drills wuu qalday karaa, sidaas darteed isticmaal per-drill breakdown ee report-ka hoose go'aannada muhiimka ah.
maay_maay.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Taabo report si aad u dooratid dhammaan, ama isticmaal badhamada hoose.
maay_maay.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Koobiyee kooban 2-4 jumlo oo luqad fudud ah oo email loo diro waalidka
maay_maay.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Dhammee drill-kaaga koowaad si aad halkan ugu aragto baseline, trend, iyo IEP report-kaaga.
maay_maay.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Session ma jiro oo u dhigma filter-ka hadda.
maay_maay.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: U dhaqaaq inta u dhexeysa drill cards iyo nav buttons
maay_maay.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Ku celi drill-kaaga ugu dambeeyay (fast jump)
maay_maay.undo_last_character: Dib u celi xarafka ugu dambeeyay
maay_maay.abandon_drill_progress_won_t_save: Ka tag drill (horumar lama kaydin doono)
maay_maay.activate_focused_button_context_depend: Shid badhanka la diiradsaday (ku xiran context)
maay_maay.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Wax kasta oo Typing Practice ku jira waxaa lagu gaari karaa keyboard — taasi waa design loogu talagalay isticmaaleyaasha screen-reader iyo motor-planning accommodations.
maay_maay.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Accommodation toggles ee shaashadda drill-intro waxaa si buuxda lagu gaari karaa keyboard iyada oo la maraayo Tab — jiid looma baahna qayb kasta oo qalabkan ah.
maay_maay.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Game mode ikhtiyaari ah. Erayada waxay ka soo kacaan hoosta; qor erayga ugu sarreeya si aad u nadiifiso. Haddii tuunta gaadho saqafka, ciyaartu way dhammaataa. Leaderboard ma leh, streak guilt ma leh — personal best keliya.
maay_maay.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Theme kasta wuxuu leeyahay mascot oo ka soo muuqda playfield, menu, iyo summary screen. Waxay ka falceliyaan waxa aad samaynayso — combo, khatar, weerar, hurdo, guul, guuldarro.
maay_maay.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Door eray weerar ah oo aad u dirto bot-ka
maay_maay.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ ATTACK READY — door eray aad dirto
maay_maay.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Taabo card AMA riix 1 / 2 / 3 si aad u dirto. Riix Esc si aad uga booddo oo aadan dirin. Tuuntaada waa la barafeeyay inta aad dooranayso.
maay_maay.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ La joojiyay — labada tuun waa la barafeeyay. Riix Resume ama Esc si aad u sii wado.
maay_maay.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Dhis aasaas. Gaabis + sax wuxuu ka adkaadaa degdeg + xun.
maay_maay.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Horumar joogto ah. Ilaali accuracy floor.
maay_maay.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Speed + accuracy oo ku jira productive band. Tababar joogto ah.
maay_maay.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM sare ayaa la gaadhay. Faa'iidooyinka xawaaraha way yaraanayaan.
maay_maay.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Xawaaruhu wuxuu ka gudbay accuracy budget. Dib ugu noqo target gaabis ah.
maay_maay.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Shan slider ayaa habeeya practice target-kaaga. Widget-ku wuxuu kala saaraa zone-kaaga mid ka mid ah 5 discrete states wuxuuna sawiraa WPM-accuracy Pareto frontier. Score kuma jiro habaynta — baaritaanku wuxuu ku jiraa helitaanka practice points joogto ah.
maay_maay.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = accuracy-ga ugu fiican ee la gaadhi karo WPM kasta. Kore = ma macquul ahan; hoos = meel koritaan u ah.
maay_maay.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Hypothesis (qoraal xor ah): Target-kaaga joogtada ah waa maxay? Accuracy floor sidee u beddelaa effective WPM?
maay_maay.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Dhig WPM=80, accuracy=98. Macquul? Barbardhig zone marker-kaaga.
maay_maay.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Hoos u dhig accuracy floor 80%. Effective WPM ma kordhayaa?
maay_maay.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Pros waxay ilaaliyaan 95%+ 70+ WPM. Baadh waddooyinka tababar ee halkaas gaadha.
maay_maay.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Target gaabis ah oo leh accuracy sare wuxuu soo saari karaa qoraal badan session kasta. Tijaabi.
maay_maay.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Waan fahmay tradeoff — ku sharrax erayadaada
maay_maay.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Ku sharrax erayadaada: sidee WPM, accuracy, iyo momentum ay isu dhexgalaan? Pareto frontier maxay u tahay typing practice?
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Design note: discrete 5-zone marker; Pareto curve wuxuu tusayaa tradeoff space; target "sax" ma jiro — design ahaan.
